kits.title: AURIC - Premium Wireless Headphones Ecommerce Template
kits.summary: Premium single-product ecommerce template for wireless headphones with checkout, cart, account, reviews, RTL support, and polished product pages.
kits.description: AURIC is a premium Next.js ecommerce template built for selling a high-end wireless headphones product. It includes a polished product landing page, cart drawer, multi-step checkout, order tracking, invoice, wishlist, compare, search, account area, support pages, policies, dark/light mode, and English/Arabic RTL support.
kits.seoTitle: AURIC Premium Next.js Ecommerce Template
kits.metaDescription: A premium Next.js single-product ecommerce template with cart, checkout, reviews, account dashboard, order tracking, RTL support, dark/light mode, and polished commercial UI.
features: Cart drawer with coupon and shipping progress
Search overlay with Cmd/Ctrl + K shortcut
LocalStorage-powered cart, wishlist, auth, router, and language contexts
useCases: Headphones and audio product landing pages

kits.title: Nimbus Pro Premium Next.js Admin Dashboard UI Kit
kits.summary: Premium Next.js admin dashboard UI kit with 129 unique pages, 10 dashboards, app screens, ecommerce admin, account settings, forms, tables, charts, UI components, auth flows, errors, dark mode, theme customizer, and command palette.
kits.description: Nimbus Pro is a premium admin dashboard UI kit built with Next.js 16, React 19, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS 4, ApexCharts, and Lucide icons. It includes 129 unique pages across dashboards, apps, ecommerce, account, forms, tables, charts, UI components, public pages, auth screens, and error states. The kit ships with original branding, a searchable/collapsible sidebar, command palette, theme customizer, light/dark mode, density controls, advanced tables, chart wrappers, realistic mock data, and responsive admin layouts for SaaS, analytics, CRM, ecommerce, finance, logistics, support, and internal tools.
kits.seoTitle: Nimbus Pro Next.js Admin Dashboard Template | Premium UI Kit
kits.metaDescription: Download Nimbus Pro, a premium Next.js admin dashboard template with 129 pages, SaaS dashboards, ecommerce admin, charts, tables, forms, dark mode, command palette, and Tailwind UI.
features: 129 unique route pages across dashboard, app, ecommerce, account, form, table, chart, UI, public, auth, and error categories
10 dashboard types for analytics, ecommerce, CRM, finance, SaaS, project, marketing, AI, support, and logistics products
Command palette with keyboard navigation and searchable route index
Theme customizer with light/dark mode, primary color choices, density controls, and persisted preferences
Advanced DataTable with search, sorting, pagination, row selection, toolbar slots, and empty states
ApexCharts wrapper with line, area, bar, pie, doughnut, radar, radial, candlestick, KPI, realtime, and report pages
Premium sidebar and header with collapsible groups, active states, mobile drawer, notifications, theme toggle, and user menu
Realistic mock data for users, products, orders, invoices, tickets, kanban, calendar, roles, permissions, coupons, reviews, transactions, files, notes, and contacts

kits.title: Aurelia Premium Next.js Ecommerce Storefront Template
kits.summary: Premium Next.js ecommerce storefront template with product catalog, shop filters, product detail pages, cart, checkout, wishlist, account pages, SEO content, coupons, and realistic demo data.
kits.description: Aurelia is a premium ecommerce storefront template built with Next.js 16, React 19, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS 4, shadcn/ui, Framer Motion, Zustand, and Lucide icons. It is designed as a high-end home and lifestyle store with 24 products across 8 categories, a full shopping flow, cart and wishlist drawers, search overlay, product detail pages with JSON-LD, checkout, order success, account pages, policy pages, FAQ, contact, auth pages, accessibility states, and reusable UI components. The package is suitable for ecommerce stores, retail demos, boutique storefronts, catalog websites, and client commerce starters.
kits.seoTitle: Aurelia Next.js Ecommerce Template | Premium Storefront UI Kit
kits.metaDescription: Download Aurelia, a premium Next.js ecommerce template with storefront, product catalog, filters, cart, checkout, wishlist, account pages, coupons, SEO content, and Tailwind UI components.
features: Premium ecommerce storefront with home, shop, product, cart, checkout, wishlist, account, auth, and policy pages
24 realistic products across 8 categories with variants, specs, care notes, FAQs, and reviews
Cart and wishlist persistence with Zustand and hydration-safe UI state
Product filters, sorting, search, quick view, mega menu, mobile menu, and sticky mobile actions
Checkout flow with contact, shipping, payment, review, coupon codes, order summary, and loading states
SEO-ready structure with route metadata, product JSON-LD, breadcrumb schema, FAQ schema, Open Graph, and robots config
Reusable shadcn/ui components, Radix primitives, Lucide icons, responsive layouts, and accessible interactions
Warm premium visual system with Playfair Display headings, Inter body text, animation, skeleton states, and hover details

kits.title: Helios Pro - Premium Next.js Admin & Dashboard UI Kit
kits.summary: A premium, production-grade Next.js 16 admin UI kit with 137 unique pages, an original emerald & amber design system, 28 reusable components, dark mode, theme customizer, command palette, and full demo-mode support - no backend required to preview.
kits.description: Helios Pro is a premium, original-branded Next.js admin dashboard UI kit built on Next.js 16 (App Router), React 19, TypeScript 5, and Tailwind CSS v4. It ships with 137 hand-crafted pages across 11 categories - 10 dashboards, 15 app pages (email, chat, kanban, calendar, invoices, support tickets), 13 ecommerce pages, 10 user & account pages, 12 form pages, 11 table variants, 10 chart pages, 21 UI component showcases, 10 marketing pages, 10 auth flows, and 6 error pages. The kit introduces an original Helios Pro brand identity (emerald primary + amber accent, sun-ray logo mark), a refined design token system (premium shadows, smooth animations, custom utilities), and 28 reusable components in src/components/shared/ - including StatCard, ChartCard, DataTable, Modal, Drawer, Tabs, Accordion, Timeline, CommandPalette, ThemeCustomizer, and a theme-aware HeliosChart wrapper around ApexCharts. Advanced features include a global command palette (Ctrl/Cmd+K) with searchable navigation, a theme customizer with 6 primary colors and density modes, light/dark mode, collapsible sidebar with search and badges, and responsive layouts across desktop, tablet, and mobile. The app runs in demo mode out of the box - no database or auth backend required. Wiring real auth (better-auth) and a database (PostgreSQL via Prisma) is fully supported via environment variables.
kits.seoTitle: Helios Pro - Premium Next.js 16 Admin Dashboard UI Kit (137 Pages)
kits.metaDescription: Helios Pro is a premium Next.js 16 admin dashboard UI kit with 137 pages, 28 reusable components, dark mode, theme customizer, command palette, and 11 page categories. Production-ready, Vercel-deployable, demo mode included.
features: 137 unique pages across 11 categories - no duplicated layouts
Original Helios Pro brand identity (emerald + amber
Light & dark mode with smooth transitions via next-themes
Global command palette (Ctrl/Cmd+K) with fuzzy search across all 137 routes
Real-time metrics page with live-updating chart and number tickers
Permission matrix (roles × modules with view/create/edit/delete toggles)
Demo mode: runs without database or auth backend - defensive stubs in lib/db
Real SVG icons only - no emojis (60+ icons in sidebar icon set)
Server/Client component split pattern (page.tsx metadata wrapper + _client.tsx for interactivity)
useCases: Finance dashboard with OHLC candlestick charts and transactions
Support ticketing system with agent leaderboard and CSAT metrics
Marketing campaign tracker with channel mix and funnel analysis
AI/ML monitoring dashboard for model usage
Logistics operations dashboard for shipments and carrier performance
Internal tool starter kit with auth
Component library showcase for design system documentation

kits.title: Lumière - Premium Fullstack Ecommerce Platform
kits.summary: A complete, production-ready premium ecommerce platform with a React + Vite customer storefront, a secure admin dashboard, cart, wishlist, checkout, mock payments, coupons, reviews, and a built-in standalone mock API - no backend required for live preview.
kits.description: Lumière is a complete, production-ready ecommerce platform built with React + Vite (client) and Express + MongoDB (server, optional). The client runs fully standalone thanks to a built-in mock API layer that serves 21 realistic products across 6 categories, complete with reviews, coupons, orders, and admin data - all persisted to localStorage. Features include a premium customer storefront (home, shop with filters/sort/pagination, category pages with FAQ schema, product detail with gallery/variants/reviews, cart drawer, wishlist drawer, checkout, order success, account section with orders/addresses/settings, auth, 9 static pages, 404/500 error pages), a full admin dashboard (revenue charts, product/category/order/customer/coupon/review/inventory/message/subscriber/settings management), JWT auth with role-based access, SEO with JSON-LD schemas, a warm premium design system with light/dark mode, and full responsiveness. Ships with demo data and credentials for instant exploration.
kits.seoTitle: Lumière - Premium React Ecommerce Template with Admin Dashboard
kits.metaDescription: Production-ready React + Vite ecommerce platform with admin dashboard, cart, checkout, mock payments, coupons, reviews, and a standalone mock API. No backend required for live preview. Demo data included.
includedPages: Account Profile / Orders / Order Detail / Addresses / Settings
About / Contact / FAQ / Shipping Policy / Returns / Privacy / Terms / Size Guide / Track Order
features: Standalone mock API - no backend required for live preview
21 realistic products with Unsplash images across 6 categories
JWT auth with role-based access (CUSTOMER / ADMIN) and httpOnly cookie support
and coupon validation (when backend is used)
Cart drawer with free-shipping progress bar and coupon validation
Quick view modal with variant selection
Search overlay with live suggestions and popular searches
Premium navbar with mega menu and scroll-aware sticky header
Premium design system: Fraunces (display) + Plus Jakarta Sans (body)
Fully responsive (mobile / tablet / desktop) with mobile filter drawers and sticky bottom CTAs
Vercel-ready with SPA routing config and asset cache headers
Optional Express + MongoDB backend with full REST API (60+ endpoints)
Optional real MongoDB support via MONGODB_URI env var
Optional real payment provider support (Stripe/Razorpay/PayPal) via env vars
Optional real email support via SMTP env var
useCases: Production ecommerce storefront for a premium lifestyle brand
Admin dashboard template for managing products
Standalone portfolio/showcase piece - runs in browser with no backend
Starting point for a fullstack React + Express + MongoDB ecommerce app
Learning resource for React + Vite + TypeScript + Tailwind patterns
Mockup/wireframe for client presentations - fully interactive
Hackathon or MVP starting point - deploy to Vercel in under 60 seconds

kits.title: MTVerse Modular AI SaaS Next.js Dashboard Template
kits.summary: Modular Next.js admin dashboard template for AI SaaS, ecommerce, CRM, analytics, finance, logistics, marketing, sales, stocks, and reusable dashboard components.
kits.description: Built from the real mt-modular suite source. This package is organized as a modular dashboard system with reusable shell primitives, dashboard navigation, premium cards, lazy charts, lazy maps, AI generator screens, ecommerce flows, CRM sections, and domain dashboards. It is positioned for developers who want a flexible Next.js admin kit they can extend feature by feature.

kits.metaDescription: Download MTVerse Modular, an AI SaaS Next.js dashboard template for ecommerce, CRM, analytics, finance, logistics, marketing, sales, stocks, charts, maps, and admin apps.

AI product screens for workspace, chat, image generation, video generation, code generation, API usage, and settings.
Ecommerce modules for product management, product detail, billing, invoices, transactions, and single-record views.
CRM modules for account health, pipeline board, renewal risk, lead radar, timeline, follow-ups, meeting schedule, drawers, and contacts table.
Real chart and map foundations with Recharts, ApexCharts, D3 Geo, TopoJSON, lazy chart loading, and lazy map loading.
Source-organized component library covering advanced UI, forms, tables, overlays, navigation, communication, media, feedback, and utilities.
